name: USB Drive Occupation Detector
description: Detect which processes are accessing USB drives, preventing safe ejection. Find the culprit and optionally kill it.

inputs.label: Drive Letter (leave empty to list all USB drives)
inputs.help: Choose a specific drive letter, or auto-detect all USB drives

inputs.label: Kill blocking processes
inputs.help: ⚠️ Terminate processes that are blocking USB ejection

inputs.label: Attempt Safe Eject after killing
inputs.help: After killing blocking processes, attempt to safely eject the USB drive
